decisions.question: Replaced ScheduleContent's chained HTML-mutating regexes with a string-first tokenizer plus single-pass plain-text token matching
decisions.chosen: Replaced ScheduleContent's chained HTML-mutating regexes with a string-first tokenizer plus single-pass plain-text token matching
decisions.reasoning: String matching after span injection corrupted class attributes, and splitting strings/comments before a combined token regex prevents later passes from reprocessing generated HTML while keeping the lightweight custom highlighter.

decisions.question: Added docs slugs relay-dashboard, observer, and react-sdk under new Tools/SDKs nav groups
decisions.chosen: Added docs slugs relay-dashboard, observer, and react-sdk under new Tools/SDKs nav groups
decisions.reasoning: Keeps product names readable in nav while using short stable slugs that match existing docs routing conventions.
